Our Farm Story

From soil to your cup, in four honest steps

We skip the layers most brands add between the farm and your shelf.

01

Sourced at the Farm

Leaf and bean bought directly from growers in Assam, Nilgiri & Munnar.

02

Sorted & Roasted

Hand-sorted for quality, then roasted in small, closely watched batches.

03

Packed Fresh

Sealed within days of roasting — no long warehouse waits.

04

Delivered to You

Straight to your door, usually within 2–5 days across India.
